content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Spiralyze: Project Manager Anywhere in the World Georgia Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0015/7118/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Atlanta, Georgia <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.spiralyze.com/">https://www.spiralyze.com/</a> </p> <div class="external-panel__trix-content external-panel__trix-content--colored external-panel__trix-content--lead-in"> <div> <div> <div>The Project Manager is a client-facing role at the center of everything we do.<br><br></div> <div>Running high-impact A/B tests requires coordination across many disciplines—research, strategy, design, copywriting, development, QA, analytics, and client stakeholders. Your job is to keep everything moving forward, aligned, and energized.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="external-panel__heading">Key Responsibilities</h2> <div class="external-panel__trix-content external-panel__trix-content--colored"> <div> <div> <div>You’ll own three core responsibilities:</div> <ol> <li>&nbsp;<strong>Coordination</strong>. You’ll manage cross-functional teams of 5–10 people and ensure tests move smoothly from idea → build → launch → analysis. You’ll spot risks early, unblock teams, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.</li> <li>&nbsp;<strong>Strategy &amp; Planning.</strong>&nbsp;You’ll help build and maintain a testing roadmap of 10–20 upcoming experiments. You’ll communicate the “why” behind the plan, set expectations, and walk clients through progress and results in weekly meetings.</li> <li>&nbsp;<strong>Energy (“Vibes”).</strong>&nbsp;You’re the main point of contact for clients and internal teams. You bring clarity, positivity, and momentum. When things get busy or complicated, you keep people focused and motivated.</li> </ol> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="external-panel__heading">Skills, Knowledge and Traits</h2> <div class="external-panel__trix-content external-panel__trix-content--colored"> <div> <div> <div>You do not need prior A/B testing experience or even formal project management experience. We will train you. Here’s what we need from you:</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <ol> <li>&nbsp;<strong>Organization and diligence.</strong>&nbsp;You like systems, checklists, and timelines. You front-load work, plan ahead, and don’t stop until things are finished properly.</li> <li>&nbsp;<strong>Communication.</strong>&nbsp;You default to over-communication. You proactively reach out to clients and teammates, flag risks early, and ask for help when you need it.</li> <li>&nbsp;<strong>Smart and high agency.</strong>&nbsp;You learn quickly, enjoy technology and design, and want to understand why things work (or don’t. You’re the kind of person who notices patterns and asks good questions.</li> </ol> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="external-panel__heading">What You’ll Get</h2> <div class="external-panel__trix-content external-panel__trix-content--colored"> <div> <div> <ul> <li><strong>Clear promotion opportunities.</strong>&nbsp;We invest heavily in training and promote almost exclusively from within. Most leaders at Spiralyze started in entry-level roles.</li> <li><strong>Tech reimbursement.</strong>&nbsp;Need a better computer, monitor, or setup? Want training on Figma or GA4? We’ll help.</li> <li><strong>In-demand skills.</strong>&nbsp;You’ll learn Conversion Rate Optimization from the most experienced experimentation teams in the world.</li> <li><strong>Time to recharge.&nbsp;</strong>20 days of paid vacation plus holidays.</li> </ul> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>If you’re excited about working with smart people, solving real problems, and growing fast in a merit-based environment, we’d love to hear from you.</div> </div> </div> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/spiralyze-project-manager-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/spiralyze-project-manager-1</a></p> Wed, 08 Jul 2026 12:07:36 +0000 Fri, 07 Aug 2026 12:07:36 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/spiralyze-project-manager-1 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/spiralyze-project-manager-1 RETR: Senior Software Engineer Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Virginia Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5755/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://retr.app/">https://retr.app/</a> </p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Why this role matters right now</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">RETR is a bootstrapped, profitable B2B SaaS company. We're growing fast with a team of twelve. No investors, no burn, no VC-driven headcount ramp. Just customers who pay, expand, and stay.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">We're building the "Carfax for mortgage and real estate." RETR is the data intelligence layer that mortgage professionals use to find and win real estate agent referral partnerships.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">This is the third engineering hire on a small team. What you build ships. What you own affects revenue that same month, not the fiscal year.</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>What you'll do</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Design, develop, and maintain scalable ASP.NET Core applications and REST APIs across a layered (WebUI → Services → Repositories → NHibernate → SQL Server) architecture</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Collaborate with product managers, designers, and engineers to define requirements and technical specifications</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Lead architecture discussions and contribute to decisions on scalability, performance, and system design</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Build and maintain background jobs with Hangfire, integrations with Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid, and Azure services</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues in production and development environments</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Participate in Agile development</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Stay current on emerging technologies and evaluate their potential impact on the platform</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>The team</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">Three engineers total. You'll report to our Director of Engineering. He reports to our CTO, who is an engineer himself. That's the org.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">Everyone ships. Everyone owns.</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>The stack</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal"><strong>Backend.</strong> ASP.NET Core, C#, REST APIs, layered architecture</li> <li class="MsoNormal"><strong>Data.&l
